Devin Nunes joined Stefanik to PURPOSELY interrupt the format of the impeachment hearing that both Republicans and Democrats agreed to -- and then claimed that Adam Schiff was being "discriminatory" when he enforced the rules. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter, Republican Rep. name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It's during times like these that you rely on your friends the most. That's why your generosity means the world to me.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191118-ty?refcode=em191118-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, thank you for your incredible support during our mid-quarter deadline. It's during times like these that you rely on your friends the most.

**That's why your generosity means the world to me.**

All eyes are on Minnesota, folks. Donald Trump and Washington Republicans see an opening in our race -- which means they're going to spend whatever it takes to prop up their chosen candidate, Jason Lewis, and turn our state red.

Every dollar you give toward important goals (like the one we just closed the books on!) allows us to build a strong grassroots campaign that can go toe-to-toe with the other side.

These next few months will not be easy, and I'm sure a lot of right-wing attacks will be hurtling toward us, but I feel so grateful for everyone on this team. It's so important to me that this campaign really is powered by the people -- and you're making that happen.

The only way Democrats can retake the Senate is if we hold strong in Minnesota, and you're doing your part every time you pitch in on a message from me or my team.

With supporters like you backing our campaign, I know we can go the full distance. Thank you, thank you, thank you.

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191118-ty?refcode=em191118-ty&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&")

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Shaping the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | When I got into this race, we began a conversation many of my opponents didn't want to have about decriminalizing border-crossings. I forced the conversation because children were being torn from their parents and thrown into cages and we need to make sure it can never happen again. We led a discussion about police reform -- not because it was poll-tested as a top issue voters in Iowa were concerned about, but because police violence has inflicted too much terror upon communities of color. [DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all") Despite it never being asked about in a debate - or getting much media attention - I have continuously talked about our nation's housing crisis, because we have a generation of everyday Americans who can't afford to buy a home, can't afford their rent, and homelessness is rising. Every day going forward I'm going to continue talking about these important issues. I'm going to be pushing my opponents to address them. I'm going to fight like hell to make sure the media gives them the attention they deserve. **One 's ability to pay for a 30-second clip of ad space in some of the most saturated media markets in the country shouldn't decide who stays in this race.** I'm in it for the long haul. I will continue to lift up the most marginalized voices in our society and we're going to keep doing things differently. **Let 's be loud.** This race isn't about the polls, it isn't about the pundits, and it isn't about me -- it's about putting People First. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc838/3eb3e2fc/5702c7ca/744d6d59/2813931913/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc838/3eb3e2fc/5702c7ca/744d6d58/2813931913/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc838/3eb3e2fc/5702c7ca/744d6d47/2813931913/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | | | | | | When I got into this race, we began a conversation many of my opponents didn't want to have about decriminalizing border-crossings. I forced the conversation because children were being torn from their parents and thrown into cages and we need to make sure it can never happen again. We led a discussion about police reform -- not because it was poll-tested as a top issue voters in Iowa were concerned about, but because police violence has inflicted too much terror upon communities of color. "" Despite it never being asked about in a debate - or getting much media attention - I have continuously talked about our nation's housing crisis, because we have a generation of everyday Americans who can't afford to buy a home, can't afford their rent, and homelessness is rising. Every day going forward I'm going to continue talking about these important issues. I'm going to be pushing my opponents to address them. I'm going to fight like hell to make sure the media gives them the attention they deserve. One 's ability to pay for a 30-second clip of ad space in some of the most saturated media markets in the country shouldn't decide who stays in this race. I'm in it for the long haul. I will continue to lift up the most marginalized voices in our society and we're going to keep doing things differently. Let 's be loud. This race isn't about the polls, it isn't about the pundits, and it isn't about me -- it's about putting People First. name: Matt Klapper, Cory 2020
subject: Taking a break from Cory's debate prep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, Matt here. I've been leading Cory's debate prep so let me be the first to tell you -- **Cory is going to have yet another incredible performance.** But here's the thing. Cory keeps asking where our fundraising is, and while it's my job to keep him focused, that's not easy when we're starting to fall behind. We need him working to lock down our strategy and discussing the issues rather than worrying about the fundraising that helps keep our campaign running. That's why I'm asking for your help today. **Will you chip in so we can give Cory some good news and keep him focused on debate prep?** Here's a link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191118_MK_20191118-fr-MK-debateprep2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you for supporting Cory. Matt Matt Klapper
Senior Advisor
Cory 2020 _P.S. Here 's a fun photo from debate prep. Can you find Cory?_ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191118_MK_20191118-fr-MK-debateprep2-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Friend, my team wants me to get back to debate prep, so I'll keep this quick. If I'm being completely honest, our fundraising is a little behind where it should be at this point in the month. **[With only three days left until the next DNC debate in Atlanta, I could use your support. Will you chip in to help us get back on track so I can get back to focusing on debate prep?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191118_MK_20191118-fr-MK-debateprep2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks in advance,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191118_MK_20191118-fr-MK-debateprep2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d48/5fca0d19/79ea58b9/291c4ac5/1977415688/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Upstate New York Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
This is why I’m fighting so hard for Upstate New York. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3e87b3ec58cc45b99088850619f7a6ee&_e=F2IuUN2E9moDNNZDPUF4CZaWCfyswOnQXt8PpHqCbD9UxmrqUcDcQc8Th7V3ILkjv2KHQSlZ9YpmXw_NLrGmQ45ZtHyeegLm2h12lZ2dTqkopadGW4wh7bxtzcZ6oDC2yUZSbh3-qenJIq_yYeg8NaFdzpX0meKCdNZ_EqOQ0J1XH7-4WC9Ftgrp8gybh9EPV4cxQXvAWfcWDJ3VM_N_GHcUwoZbxKk3G9zP83abyCkA439Bw1kGG6ntislOrtXrIhhdYwOos9PyskJumPkaFxsbMAJ6Lw9gQiTifkl9jc9VAmonOaskp79e7Uot9X3-xroehrGUdpnm7yTvlykiVKWeTb0WcPQH3v2P3ibxL1YMlCkIt-7NGuDWAd5xQ_ZPbQ8fkvlb3IFJuHYG_HJmtiC_ifHIKmqEMXirx4KikkZdPvZfHqICcrkq94IOaf6h) | |
---
Peter,

As a small business owner and single mother, I know the value of hard work, determination and grit. Every day, Upstate New Yorkers fight to provide for their families, and we deserve someone in Washington who fights for us.

But, right now we don’t have that. Our representative, Anthony Brindisi, has turned his back on us, and I’m fighting to put Upstate first again.

**Join my fight to put Upstate New York first. Add your name below:**
[ **PUT UPSTATE NEW YORK FIRST** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3e87b3ec58cc45b99088850619f7a6ee&_e=F2IuUN2E9moDNNZDPUF4CZaWCfyswOnQXt8PpHqCbD9UxmrqUcDcQc8Th7V3ILkjv2KHQSlZ9YpmXw_NLrGmQ45ZtHyeegLm2h12lZ2dTqkopadGW4wh7bxtzcZ6oDC2yUZSbh3-qenJIq_yYeg8NaFdzpX0meKCdNZ_EqOQ0J1XH7-4WC9Ftgrp8gybh9EPV4cxQXvAWfcWDJ3VM_N_GHcUwoZbxKk3G9zP83abyCklUH3I49TGLGhHRQfk_plihURh7g7XEFG_oeFObcCiuWCwSD5JODjXyqADNeDFpDFevPKCIMyA8l3gnF51vM0O42dIa0A3WyImb4EDBJuNsiBEy7csisY0ozvSEUy-5tg6X7tmHcjb7JkCqSuriCWkEWpryE62KniNk9-AhwizmNBZHyWXR8HJ1QuIInUEG81YEF6eoGDkP9PEOKYNhfm5)
I was born and raised in New Hartford. My mom ran the family business and my dad was a judge— all while juggling five kids. From a young age, we learned to look out for one another, stand up for the underdog and stand tall for ourselves.

Now, I’m looking out for Upstate New York. Upstate is always overshadowed and forgotten about by our elected officials, but that ends with me.

**Help me put Upstate New York first and bring back our jobs to the hardworking people of our community![Join my fight >>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3e87b3ec58cc45b99088850619f7a6ee&_e=F2IuUN2E9moDNNZDPUF4CZaWCfyswOnQXt8PpHqCbD9UxmrqUcDcQc8Th7V3ILkjv2KHQSlZ9YpmXw_NLrGmQ45ZtHyeegLm2h12lZ2dTqkopadGW4wh7bxtzcZ6oDC2yUZSbh3-qenJIq_yYeg8NaFdzpX0meKCdNZ_EqOQ0J1XH7-4WC9Ftgrp8gybh9EPV4cxQXvAWfcWDJ3VM_N_GHcUwoZbxKk3G9zP83abyCkkSL8XOD8_iqgVv2ebtevAfYV3hkex1VypUsqM9Jn3rAE9F9dI-FPSWUufMmCl4bPvxwwtM1Tr6LC0oXw6fvcaypypcrJpNe2h0t7dBI7Uz2pTWgbaQ0SDrrTkf3ENvgIPSPlXTD9BI1zUBe_XZ3G-W5GXqm6v8jwKfJPE0-pjPt3dLzZOgGXrmtsrSaAgTYXIe2qLO9-HNvIYQoXoB6ZN)**

I became a single mom when my son Trey was young. It was hard to help with homework and baseball practice while trying to manage a business and meet payroll every week, but like most Upstate New Yorkers, we made it work.

Today, Trey serves our country as a Captain in the Marine Corps. I’m so proud of his decision and better understand the cost of keeping our country safe.

This community has taught him everything he knows about service, and it’s taught me everything that I know about hard work. That’s why I’m fighting so hard to put our community first again.
[ **PUT UPSTATE NEW YORK FIRST** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3e87b3ec58cc45b99088850619f7a6ee&_e=F2IuUN2E9moDNNZDPUF4CZaWCfyswOnQXt8PpHqCbD9UxmrqUcDcQc8Th7V3ILkjv2KHQSlZ9YpmXw_NLrGmQ45ZtHyeegLm2h12lZ2dTqkopadGW4wh7bxtzcZ6oDC2yUZSbh3-qenJIq_yYeg8NaFdzpX0meKCdNZ_EqOQ0J1XH7-4WC9Ftgrp8gybh9EPV4cxQXvAWfcWDJ3VM_N_GHcUwoZbxKk3G9zP83abyCnnYDPueKGokMp70Y-MCLACIKGgwt9KNkR_byTOAH0PVgh5SNDbRt_S7OEVfOwE_P437W8w1wbp9p3fwKOWplWqsKjFUHFifoMAXCTLC61ix4rBxqkjaSXMHq_z_bVh6aoeXtUAJNOQF_eutp8xIYAxOrsG7-jsMDOZPPdc6hGAe7PUdfLqHOFRU9gXblnxfgMQwojSqMj72edsDjBjuyq5)
That’s why I want to represent New York’s 22nd Congressional District in Congress. **[Join my fight to put Upstate New York first.>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3e87b3ec58cc45b99088850619f7a6ee&_e=F2IuUN2E9moDNNZDPUF4CZaWCfyswOnQXt8PpHqCbD9UxmrqUcDcQc8Th7V3ILkjv2KHQSlZ9YpmXw_NLrGmQ45ZtHyeegLm2h12lZ2dTqkopadGW4wh7bxtzcZ6oDC2yUZSbh3-qenJIq_yYeg8NaFdzpX0meKCdNZ_EqOQ0J1XH7-4WC9Ftgrp8gybh9EPV4cxQXvAWfcWDJ3VM_N_GHcUwoZbxKk3G9zP83abyClHRwUUsO_50rfun6F38ga8EltCCeaUMTIFKwBSlZJbmEFgs6seunKlhjvNQx7dridrdOOGhY_NRY2VxiiWyPvknMvY-u6x6vetWZu5VlUlDpoCRQrYr3bIGIaui5c6YzML4FMlYu-MpwoXl6lfCC69gwzGRqhHQWzzR1eb8vjZuH05mqnXA4Ot9_IDDj5Z1qiVw-BkggmErFPoD-rxT6Jc)**

Thanks for your support,

Claudia Tenney

clean_body: This is why I’m fighting so hard for Upstate New York. | | Peter, As a small business owner and single mother, I know the value of hard work, determination and grit. Every day, Upstate New Yorkers fight to provide for their families, and we deserve someone in Washington who fights for us. But, right now we don’t have that. Our representative, Anthony Brindisi, has turned his back on us, and I’m fighting to put Upstate first again. Join my fight to put Upstate New York first. Add your name below: I was born and raised in New Hartford. My mom ran the family business and my dad was a judge— all while juggling five kids. From a young age, we learned to look out for one another, stand up for the underdog and stand tall for ourselves. Now, I’m looking out for Upstate New York. Upstate is always overshadowed and forgotten about by our elected officials, but that ends with me. Help me put Upstate New York first and bring back our jobs to the hardworking people of our community I became a single mom when my son Trey was young. It was hard to help with homework and baseball practice while trying to manage a business and meet payroll every week, but like most Upstate New Yorkers, we made it work. Today, Trey serves our country as a Captain in the Marine Corps. I’m so proud of his decision and better understand the cost of keeping our country safe. This community has taught him everything he knows about service, and it’s taught me everything that I know about hard work. That’s why I’m fighting so hard to put our community first again. That’s why I want to represent New York’s 22nd Congressional District in Congress. Thanks for your support, Claudia Tenney | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: The Swamp is 0-3 on its Impeachment TV drama
body:
Last week was supposed to be House Democrats’ big moment. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=942e8faa04&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 18, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: The Swamp is 0-3 on its Impeachment TV drama**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=adb779fba6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Last week** was supposed to be House Democrats’ big moment. It was supposed to be the week they finally, after striking out with the Russia collusion hoax, put their impeachment crusade on the map for the majority of Americans they need to persuade.

**Of course** , it didn’t work out that way.

**Rather than** make his case credible, Rep. Adam Schiff’s (D-CA) first three “star witnesses” left most Americans wondering why they were even invited to testify in the first place. After Democrats asked their guests questions such as how President Donald J. Trump made them feel, House Republicans got to the heart of the matter.

**Here are the only answers** that matter if a political party wants to impeach the duly elected President of the United States: Last week’s witnesses testified that they had _no_ knowledge of any impeachable offenses, _no_ firsthand account of [**President Trump’s phone call**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf49d327d5&e=3ee4985eea) with Ukraine, and _zero_ contact with the President at any point this year.

**In fact, two** **of them** have _never even_ _met_ President Trump!

**House Democrats** are hoping to rebound this week, introducing a whole new lineup of witnesses for Schiff’s Impeachment TV circus. They shouldn’t get their hopes up. Just like last week, each of these witnesses share something important in common: They have no actual evidence of any impeachable offense committed by the President.

**The reason is simple****: **There was no such offense. Just like with Democrats’ 2-year, $32 million taxpayer-funded Russia collusion obsession, this “investigation” serves one real goal: keeping the far-left base happy while obstructing any meaningful bipartisan work on Capitol Hill so long as Donald Trump is President.

**In other words** , we have a new hoax on our hands, but it’s still the same old swamp.

[“Here’s a witness Schiff doesn’t dare call in impeachment hearings.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c05b79384e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Memo to Dems:** [The President, not diplomats, sets ‘official foreign policy’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccf24cffc9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **They can’t hide your healthcare prices any longer **

**While Democrats in Congress** are busy doing anything they can not to help working Americans under this President, the Trump Administration unveiled a pair of new rules on Friday that will make healthcare prices simpler and clearer than ever before.

**“We’re requiring price transparency** in healthcare, forcing companies to compete for your business,” President Trump said from the White House. “Our goal was to give patients the knowledge they need about the real price of healthcare services.”

**What does that mean** for patients? “They’ll be able to check them, compare them, go to different locations—so they can shop for the highest-quality care at the lowest cost.”

**The first rule** compels hospitals to finally publish their prices online for all to see. For years, these prices were often all but impossible to find, leaving Americans with nasty surprise bills after a medical visit. Now, families will be able to see and compare all of these costs beforehand with the new, easy-to-read formats that will soon be available.

**The next rule,** newly proposed, will require health insurance providers and group health plans to give cost estimates to enrollees _before_ care is delivered. Like it’s doing with hospitals, the Trump Administration wants to push these companies to make lists of all their pricing information available to the public.

**Together,** these actions represent the most aggressive steps taken by any President to put healthcare price information in the hands of patients. That’s important not just for honesty and fairness; transparent prices also lead to lower healthcare costs overall.

**Powerful interest groups** spent years trying to keep these rules from happening. By making the true price and quality of care a closely guarded secret, the industry giants controlled the markets—and your healthcare dollars. When President Trump came to Washington, he promised to do things differently than Beltway career insiders have done for years. “We’re taking on the bureaucrats in more ways than one,” he said Friday.

[“Trump's team delivers a big win for patients by making health costs clearer.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70ca91d8ff&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [Trump Administration makes health care in rural areas a priority](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04125a0455&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour
| **President Trump waves as he prepares to board Air Force One at Joint Base Andrews** | November 14, 2019
---
|

Peter,

Thanks to your incredible support, we hit our critical goal yesterday -- but we can't stop there. I'm reaching out because **I need your help staying on track to build up a campaign that can compete with Senator John Cornyn and WIN**. I know the election is a ways away, but give me a minute and I'm going to explain why pitching in _right now_ is so important.

(If you're already with me, you can pitch in here: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/FightBackFund](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909c7/7f51f7bc/4be4a311/4ef0abff/1895593564/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-scrrfund?refcode=email_20191118.1nd__524__&amount=10&recurring=true")**)

Senator Cornyn already aired the first TV ads of the campaign, thanks to the nearly $11 million war chest he amassed with lots of help from corporate PAC and special interest donors. He's not going to hold back. This race is already well underway, and it's clear it's going to be a long and expensive one. That's why pitching in right now is so critical.

Here's the deal: I don't have any corporate PACs pouring money into my campaign, hoping I'll play nice with them once I'm Senator. I'm not taking their money because **I will be accountable to the people, not special interests.**
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909c7/7f51f7bc/4be4a311/4ef0abff/1895593564/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-scrrfund?refcode=email_20191118.1nd__524__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We’ve got the momentum. Let’s strike while the iron is hot. Thanks, Eric Ming Digital and Paid Media Director We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83a/3eb3e2fc/5709129a/744d6e09/58863153/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83a/3eb3e2fc/5709129a/744d6e08/58863153/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83a/3eb3e2fc/5709129a/744d6e77/58863153/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

body:

Fellow Patriot, we need your help now more than ever before.

There are three CRITICAL impeachment hearings this week.

We must raise $250,000 this week to DEFEND President Trump during this ridiculous impeachment sham.

This is our BIGGEST fundraising goal ever and reaching it won't be easy.

The time to step up is now. [**Our fundraising deadline is ONLY days away. Don 't miss out. Rush your support NOW.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53518014:WV5TnTvgN:m:1:1155937413:1255CC5B63E973D2B87AC0429E18184A:r)

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 11/18
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! It has been another busy week on the campaign trail. I wanted to give you a quick update of what we've been up to. In the last week, I've spent some time out in East Tennessee. I've put in a lot of miles, all throughout Davidson County, Hamilton County, Bradley County, Wilson County, Knox County, and Grainger County! I always enjoy spending time with my fellow Tennesseans, and really enjoyed being in East Tennessee this week. We have another busy week come up. This upcoming week I'll be going to events in all three Grand Divisions, and can't wait to see you there! I am thankful for all the support we've been getting across the great state and I can't wait to meet even more of you. **Media: ** Our social media post of the week comes from my meeting with the Fraternal Order of Police in Oak Ridge on Saturday. It was an honor to speak about my plans to support and empower local law enforcement across the state as well as hear about what elected officials can do to help them. I am extremely grateful for everything our law enforcement and first responders do for our communities. I know first-hand how stressful and dangerous their job is. They need to be given our total and complete support. As your next US Senator, I will make sure that our elected officials protect law enforcement, just like they protect us. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhhfuy-uunkhiuw-y/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhhfuy-uunkhiuw-j/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhhfuy-uunkhiuw-t/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhhfuy-uunkhiuw-i/) As always, thank you so much for your continued support. It means the world to me. Dr. Manny P.S. Would you mind chipping in to our campaign? We sure would appreciate it. [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhhfuy-uunkhiuw-d/) |
| |

---|---|---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Week 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Impeachment Scam continues. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b8d815fd5349ab23e76f5ddb250e45eefee78ba09c616cd102577a42714a3bae73d4d95d11c54d0051b9a0dce485434ae2524e8da5e35571)
---

Friend,

This Impeachment Hoax is setting a bad precedent for our country. Each day these hearings prove what we've known all along: **THIS IS A POLITICAL HIT JOB.**

The Democrats know that what they are doing is very wrong. They're putting Americans through a second week of these baseless Witch Hunt Hearings when we all know how it's going to end.

**_I DID NOTHING WRONG. Plain and simple._**

Nervous Nancy and Shifty Schiff know they have nothing on me. This all goes back to their HATRED for me, and their **HATRED FOR YOU.** We've got to do something.

To show that our movement is growing in strength and in numbers I'm setting an unprecedented goal.
---
|
There's never been a better time to make your _FIRST EVER DONATION_ and tell the Left you stand with YOUR President. **I want to get 100,000 donors by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** to show them just how STRONG our movement is despite their nasty LIES.

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: How to deal with China: my article in the Harvard International Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
One day as I gathered in the White House situation room for an NSC meeting, President Clinton’s National Security Advisor asked, “Where is our China strategy?” Today, we are still searching.
**My article in the Harvard International Review** (link below), underscores how, for far too long, our elected officials have failed to take seriously the challenges China poses to our country and to a rules-based world order. I am running for President to unite this country and to convene the world in a global concord that addresses the challenges China poses to our collective good. **We need a President who understands these risks, and who has the global experience and knowledge to keep our economy thriving and our country safe by leading and working alongside our friends and allies. I am that President.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013244/123078801/1036341175?refcode=em111919china&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=)
**My Harvard International Review article outlines what I have been writing about and saying for years** , and now, as the only candidate in the race who fully understands the military, economic, geopolitical and technical threat the People's Republic of China represents, I want to bring about the strategy that can meet the challenge to the values we have upheld around the world.
I have long believed that **dealing with China is the chief strategic imperative of the 21st century** , and recent developments — concerning the **5G internet, the expansion of China’s military footprint around the world, their “belt and road initiative,” and human rights violations from Xinjiang to Hong Kong** — have only reaffirmed that belief.
When American policymakers and the news media discuss China these days, they are typically talking about President Trump’s trade war. This sole focus is a distraction from the larger geo-strategic issues at play (in which fair trade does have an important part) in Sino-U.S. relations and **China’s inexorable drive to become a world power eclipsing the United States.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013245/123078803/1036341175?refcode=em111919china&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=)
Throughout the world, China has embarked on an ambitious and comprehensive global development plan known as the **“Belt and Road Initiative,” **which involves building an array of infrastructure projects in nearly every country on the planet. According to Chinese sources, the government has now signed cooperative “Belt & Road” agreements with at least 126 countries and 29 international organizations.
At the same time, China is using its economic influence to spread its military reach, including by illegally building artificial islands in the South China Sea to establish naval dominance in the region — and **according to the U.S. military commander of the Pacific, China now has command of the Western Pacific. It is the first loss of command of the seas by the U.S. Navy anywhere in the world since World War II. **
China has opened an overseas naval base in the African nation of Djibouti, with a second on the way in Cambodia. It is projected that Djibouti has public debts worth about 88% of its annual GDP, with China owning most of it. The naval base is part of their payment. Likewise, debt incurred by Sri Lanka forced them to sign over to China its stake in a newly constructed port in the country for 99 years. This is **debt-trap diplomacy, plain and simple.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013246/123078805/1036341175?refcode=em111919china&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=)
But **the biggest threat China currently presents to the world comes from their domination in the arena of 5G wireless infrastructure.** China makes every country that signs up for Belt and Road agree to add China’s 5G service as well. **Everything will flow through Chinese technology — from virtual business meetings to personal email accounts, artificial intelligence data to intelligence gathering — so they will be able to have eyes on everything. **
They will also be able to damage critical infrastructure, from our electrical grid to nuclear power plants to dams that can drown entire cities. **We need to launch a public-private effort, much like the Eisenhower administration did with the Interstate Highway System, to produce American-made 5G technology and lay the necessary infrastructure to support it — globally, for our security and the world's.**
There are many other issues that make China the biggest threat we face geopolitically, from human rights violations against Muslim Uighur citizens to unfair trade policies. **Yet neither the President nor those seeking the Democratic presidential nomination understand this. ****No one else in the field of Democratic nominees understands the breadth of China's challenge China or how to respond to it — otherwise, they would be addressing it in depth and breadth. [Please contribute to ensure I can be the President who will convene the world to meet the geo-strategic challenge of China by reinvigorating American leadership of a strengthened liberal world order.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013247/123078806/723115086?refcode=em111919china&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=)**
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013248/123078807/1036341175?refcode=em111919china&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=)
Warmest regards, Joe
**Link to article: [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013249/123078808/-567290602?emci=836a2e61-b607-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=)**
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12013250/123078809/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODU1NDM3Ny1lMTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7OwDtnjVgzZ2dO-R0WsXlLg1vPGcxc0E6-GRdckOc=&emci=836a2e61-b607-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=b8554377-e10a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798) and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

body:
Hey there! Did you see Sri's email about our latest endorsement? **Here 's the quick version: This grassroots movement is growing FAST, and now, End Citizens United, a national leader in campaign finance reform, has endorsed Sri for TX-22!** They know we have the power to flip this critical district blue AND do it the right way -- _without_ corporate PAC money! But that means we can't have a single supporter sitting on the sidelines: [**Seriously, we need your help! Will you join ECU in supporting our grassroots movement? name: Troy Newman
subject: Sign the Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood!
body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==)
---
Fellow Pro-Life American, In 2016, you and I supported President Trump's campaign for a whole host of reasons. But one of the most important reasons was because he courageously promised to **_defund Planned Parenthood_** and stop their slaughter of hundreds of thousands of innocent babies every single year. **So, I'm sure you're as furious as I am that another year has come and gone, and Congress has failed --__AGAIN__ \-- to defund the nation's largest abortion provider.** [**Will you help me do something about it right now by signing Operation Rescue's National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood, and urging all of your pro-life friends and family members to do the same?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==) | [** Sign the Petition**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==)
---
My name is **Troy Newman** , and I am the president of **Operation Rescue** , one of the most effective and tenacious enemies of Planned Parenthood and the abortion industry.
_Over the past few decades, our grassroots operations have exposed the horrors of the abortion industry and led to the closure of numerous abortion clinics, resulting in untold thousands of innocent children saved from a horrible death_.
**But right now, we are on the cusp of the biggest pro-life victory I have ever seen.**
In 2015, I was involved in planning and funding the groundbreaking undercover videos made by the Center for Medical Progress, which exposed Planned Parenthood's illegal sale of baby body parts for profit.
As a result, these butchers lost taxpayer funding in 10 states, have had it cut in several others, and were investigated by a Congressional committee.
This is good news.
But, like a wounded animal, Planned Parenthood is more dangerous than ever. They have filed lawsuits against all 15 of the states that have revoked or cut their public funds and are demanding that that funding be restored.
And on top of that, they have filed MASSIVE lawsuits against the people who work so hard to expose and shut them down -- including **__ME_!_**
[**Now, more than ever, we must urge Congress to cut off all federal funds to this abortion mill. Please sign the petition right now, and help us urge them to help President Trump keep this important promise.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==)
**Planned Parenthood spent millions of dollars last year on "rebranding" themselves. They're working desperately to hold onto their federal funding after their barbaric practices were exposed to a national audience.**
You see, they believe they're __entitled__ to our money. They believe it's __OUR__ job to fund their ghoulish work of murdering innocent children and selling their body parts for profit.
We can't let that happen.
[**Please sign the petition right away. Congress needs to hear from you immediately. We can't let them fund Planned Parenthood for another DAY -- let alone another year.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==)
Planned Parenthood is a billion-dollar-per-year organization, and they have an army of attorneys and marketers aggressively trying to silence their opponents.
They're determined to strong-arm American taxpayers into subsidizing their slaughter of innocent children, one way or another.
**_As pro-life Americans, it's up to us to stop them._**
[**The first step is signing this national petition. Will you please do that right now and join us in the fight for Life?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==)
Thank you so much for your help.
Faithfully yours,
Troy Newman
President
Operation Rescue

[**Sign the Petition**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5PLhm7RmG3R3HGTWrtwQO_YnUvtNzVYUvrZXKinvIdXQ4ctIE9NbfHzfvarD95u_ZWYH0Ix0hdBFXE2uP3LjDhnOA3UqWH1pDFxqOhED7ZE5GvbPRO6WRuQghDyrEdnVKtXuiSedJafo6UQeF55wBd2Jtjq_kr97zkW0aZO5ZNwj2IzNwZMP5TFo1Dx_IEksohZreVavpU=&c=wP5sqt-_jjNVW9mXG2GhQjlrxHW07Ylj2yNScT73ZW2X1_9TrjOBzg==&ch=RGbQx-ehaiX6QFB0yBpFhClMxbQO93dV4WoffSD6LoHlThm_ne8foA==)

clean_body: == Fellow Pro-Life American, In 2016, you and I supported President Trump's campaign for a whole host of reasons. But one of the most important reasons was because he courageously promised to defund Planned Parenthood and stop their slaughter of hundreds of thousands of innocent babies every single year. So, I'm sure you're as furious as I am that another year has come and gone, and Congress has failed --AGAIN \-- to defund the nation's largest abortion provider. == | == My name is Troy Newman , and I am the president of Operation Rescue , one of the most effective and tenacious enemies of Planned Parenthood and the abortion industry. Over the past few decades, our grassroots operations have exposed the horrors of the abortion industry and led to the closure of numerous abortion clinics, resulting in untold thousands of innocent children saved from a horrible death. But right now, we are on the cusp of the biggest pro-life victory I have ever seen. In 2015, I was involved in planning and funding the groundbreaking undercover videos made by the Center for Medical Progress, which exposed Planned Parenthood's illegal sale of baby body parts for profit. As a result, these butchers lost taxpayer funding in 10 states, have had it cut in several others, and were investigated by a Congressional committee. This is good news. But, like a wounded animal, Planned Parenthood is more dangerous than ever. They have filed lawsuits against all 15 of the states that have revoked or cut their public funds and are demanding that that funding be restored. And on top of that, they have filed MASSIVE lawsuits against the people who work so hard to expose and shut them down -- including ME! == Planned Parenthood spent millions of dollars last year on "rebranding" themselves. They're working desperately to hold onto their federal funding after their barbaric practices were exposed to a national audience. You see, they believe they're entitled to our money. They believe it's OUR job to fund their ghoulish work of murdering innocent children and selling their body parts for profit. We can't let that happen. == Planned Parenthood is a billion-dollar-per-year organization, and they have an army of attorneys and marketers aggressively trying to silence their opponents. They're determined to strong-arm American taxpayers into subsidizing their slaughter of innocent children, one way or another. As pro-life Americans, it's up to us to stop them. == Thank you so much for your help. Faithfully yours, Troy Newman President Operation Rescue == Operation Rescue | 3013 E. In order to be successful, we need financial resources to help our candidates across the finish line. What better way to help us raise those funds than by joining us on December 3rd to celebrate the season at this fun event with an important mission? _Chairman Dick Hinch, Treasurer Sherman Packard, and Vice Chair Jason Osborne cordially invite you to a_

& Christmas Party**_

Margaret

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA |
body:
ICYMI:

Elections have consequences. Voting matters! The Democratic victories in Virginia put these truths in sharp relief. Virginia’s House and Senate just won a democratic majority on Nov 5th and their Governor is also a Democrat! That means Virginia can now become the final state to ratify the Constitution with another amendment known as the Equal Rights Amendment.

The ERA will guarantee full and equal protections claims based on sex, as they now do to claims based on race, religion or national origin. The ERA is a long overdue remedy to the inequality faced by girls and women over the past 200+ years.

Equal Rights Amendment has already ratified by 37 of 38 states-the number needed (three-fourths of the states to ratify) to add the ERA to the Constitution!! VA state legislators have pledged to bring the ERA to the Virginia Assembly for passage in early 2020, making it the 38th and final state necessary for ratification.

I am a proud Board member of the National Organization for Women (NOW). At our recent NOW’s national board meeting (photograph above), we discussed the critical role NOW played in the ERA Coalition and the hard work NOW did to make this victory happen in Virginia. NOW along with our ERA Coalition partners have toiled since 1972 for the ratification. The ERA was written by women’s suffragist Alice Paul in 1923. After the House passed the ERA in 1971 and the Senate followed suit in 1972, it was sent to the states for ratification.

NOW was coordinating with and working for candidates across Virginia, focused on two things. (1) bringing out the college vote through ERA and young feminist messaging. (2) electing pro-women and ERA candidates in targeted districts in which there were no colleges.

WHAT JUST HAPPENED IN CONGRESS ON WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 13TH:

The U.S. House Committee on the Judiciary passed the H. J. Res. 79, Removing the deadline for the ratification of the equal rights amendment.

While this deadline removal was not required, NOW and other members of the ERA Coalition pushed for it as “backup” insurance.*

Action is needed in the Senate as well for S.J.RES.6: A joint resolution removing the deadline for the ratification of the equal rights amendment. This bill will need both Republican and Democrat cosponsors, so it is vital that we reach out to both parties to urge their sponsorship.

Contact Your Senator:

Capitol Switchboard, 202-224-3121, or find your Senator online here.

I am a voter in ___(Your State)___ and I urge you to cosponsor and support Senate bill S.J.RES.6: A joint resolution removing the deadline for the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment. The ERA will guarantee full and equal protections claims based on sex, as they now do to claims based on race, religion or national origin. The ERA is a long overdue remedy to the inequality faced by girls and women over the past 200+ years. When Virginia becomes the last state to ratify this amendment, removing the deadline will be helpful to the effort if and when the ERA faces legal challenges.

I am running for Auditor General to restore two things in short supply in Pennsylvania: Accountability and Transparency. Pennsylvania has never been represented by a person of color or an advocate for women in a Statewide Row office. Help me on my road in bringing a new voice to Harrisburg so I can continue advocate for equality and use data of the AG’s office to help shape equitable policies since !

Representation matters!

Here is an online link: https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3753951775916231680

Checks may be made out to Nina for PA and mailed to:

Nina for PA

P.O. Box 40681

Philadelphia, PA 19107

Please note, there are no contribution limits for this race. The Primary Election is on April 28, 2020. As an early investor, you will help build this campaign and help me start strong. Thank you for your consideration!

---------------------------------
| Paid for by Nina for PA |
---------------------------------

Nina for PA
PO Box 40681
Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/zXbqg2HgjozoY2WKBm6_9Fy9dn7qrQskT5_J6qSdfn0=/p5vzuEkZuRZgBqdy3kIkwlGZfrbPKk1CQqQCc1L1OIY=.

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: I have something Betsy DeVos doesn’t - lived experience. That’s why I know that our children deserve better.

**I have something DeVos doesn’t - classroom experience.** For the past six years I have walked into a classroom every single day to learn and grow alongside my students. Public schools are where our children go to socialize, grow, learn, thrive, and build important relationships.

name: Ben Salango
subject: Why I'm running
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/78839/images/Salango%20Logo%20PMS%20Reversed%20Op%201.png]
Friend,
T he support for our campaign is growing every day because West Virginians understand that our state is at a crossroads. We can either fall backward under Jim Justice’s mismanagement, or move forward with fresh ideas and common sense solutions. I want to tell you why I’m in this race and why moving West Virginia forward is so important to me.
I grew up on Sullivan Road in Raleigh County, West Virginia, where I watched my parents start a small business in the living room of our two bedroom trailer. I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth, and I didn’t come from money. I’m running against Jim Justice because working people need a governor on their side every single day.
I saw my parents struggle and work hard to make ends meet. I’ll never forget the first paycheck I earned bagging groceries at Kroger as a proud union member. Those values of hard work, honesty, and compassion are what make West Virginia special.
I ’ve always believed in fighting for the little guy and standing up for what’s right . That’s why I went into law - because I’ve always wanted to hold the powerful accountable and fight for working people. Whether it be coal miners who are being used by their bosses, our most vulnerable being abused by those who are meant to care for them, or a senior who deserves respect and dignity...those are the people that I have spent my life fighting for. And those are the people who I will continue to fight for as governor.
I ’d be humbled if you joined our campaign. Click here to donate.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sullivanroad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sullivanroad]
S incerely,
B en Salango
C andidate for Governor
P.S. Pitch in $50 or more before Thanksgiving so we can spread our message across West Virginia.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sullivanroad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sullivanroad]

Ben Salango for West Virginia
PO Box 11650
Charleston, WV 25339
United States

name: Senator John Cornyn
subject: Schiff Vs. Stefanik
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc
body:
I don't know if you've heard yet, but I needed to bring you up to speed on this, friend.
This past week, during the awful impeachment hearings of President Donald Trump, a new Republican star emerged - Rep. Elise Stefanik.
She acted as a staunch defender of the truth - stopping at nothing to expose the lunacy at the center of the Democrats' case against our president...
But you know what happens to those you and I hail as heroes for truth, friend... the left makes them public enemy number one.
It couldn't be more true. Since Rep. Stefanik stepped up in defense of President Trump, liberal elites from coast to coast have turned all attention to her small district in New York, pouring in MILLIONS to fund her radical opponent's campaign.
From Hollywood liberals to socialist-supporting mega-donors, the left is ALL-IN trying to destroy her... all because she had the audacity to stick up for a president we all know did nothing wrong!
Now, friend, as freedom-loving conservatives, we must stand strong with Rep. Stefanik!

name: Cory Booker
subject: Joe Biden & Elizabeth Warren & Bernie Sanders & Pete Buttigieg & Kamala Harris & Amy Klobuchar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, here's what the debate stages have looked like so far: **FIRST:** The DNC required that each candidate have 130,000 individual donors to qualify for the September and October debates -- and twelve candidates made it on stage. **I was one of them.** **THEN:** They raised the threshold to 165,000 individual donors to qualify for the November debate -- and ten candidates qualified. **I was one of them.** **NOW:** They raised the threshold to 200,000 individual donors for the December debate, and so far only six candidates have secured their spot. _**I 'm not one of them.**_ This is not an easy requirement to meet, but I believe that we can get there. Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, and Amy Klobuchar have all qualified for the December debate. My team tells me we're fewer than 15,000 donors away. **Will you help me join my colleagues on stage by chipping in whatever you can -- even $1 counts -- to become one of the donors who gets me on the December debate stage?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191119_CB_20191119-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Let's abolish the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094d/55b66746/2c887856/80f2028/540224405/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | The Framers of the Constitution created the Electoral College for two main reasons, both unjust:
1. To boost the voting power of slave states, and
2. To insulate the powerful elite from the will of the people.

And, true to its design, the Electoral College has, over two hundred years, steadily mangled American democracy, directing power away from working people and toward special interests and political insiders. [**Our movement's fighting back. Chip in $3 now to recharge our democracy!**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094d/55b66746/2c887856/80f2029/540224405/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-18-abolishec&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Instituting a National Popular Vote would dramatically improve our democracy on day one: **1\. There'd be no more "red states," "blue states," or "swing states."** Imagine, if, instead of fighting over a handful of people in swing states, presidential candidates had to work to win _every_ vote. Americans in states like Massachusetts or Texas would know that their votes mattered just as much as the ones from Florida and Ohio. **2\. We'd make good on the simple promise of**** _one person, one vote_****.** Right now, votes from less populous states count significantly more than those from larger states. In terms of Electoral College impact, a single voter in Wyoming has about _three and a half times_ as much influence as a California voter. **3\. Elections would reflect the will of the people.** In two of the last five presidential elections, the candidate who lost the popular vote still won the presidency. In other words: in the 21st century, our election system has delivered a wrong result _40% of the time._ Our elections work best when all people can participate equally and in good faith. **The Electoral College undermines both the value and the meaning of that participation, without offering any benefit. The sooner we abolish it, the healthier our democracy will be.** [**Are you with me? Contribute $3 now to fuel the clean_body: | "" | | The Framers of the Constitution created the Electoral College for two main reasons, both unjust: 1. To boost the voting power of slave states, and 2. To insulate the powerful elite from the will of the people. And, true to its design, the Electoral College has, over two hundred years, steadily mangled American democracy, directing power away from working people and toward special interests and political insiders. "" Instituting a National Popular Vote would dramatically improve our democracy on day one: 1\. There'd be no more "red states," "blue states," or "swing states." Imagine, if, instead of fighting over a handful of people in swing states, presidential candidates had to work to win every vote. Americans in states like Massachusetts or Texas would know that their votes mattered just as much as the ones from Florida and Ohio. 2\. We'd make good on the simple promise of one person, one vote. Right now, votes from less populous states count significantly more than those from larger states. In terms of Electoral College impact, a single voter in Wyoming has about three and a half times as much influence as a California voter. 3\. Elections would reflect the will of the people. In two of the last five presidential elections, the candidate who lost the popular vote still won the presidency. In other words: in the 21st century, our election system has delivered a wrong result 40% of the time. Our elections work best when all people can participate equally and in good faith. The Electoral College undermines both the value and the meaning of that participation, without offering any benefit. The sooner we abolish it, the healthier our democracy will be. "" "" Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". >
Here's the deal. Every debate shines a bright spotlight on this race -- for some people watching, this will be the first time they're getting interested in getting involved. We have an opportunity to capture that energy and direct it into organizing power, but it's going to take serious resources to do it.

That's why I'm reaching out to you in this critical moment.

If we're able to get back on track towards our November goal tonight, we'll be in the strongest position possible to build this grassroots movement for tomorrow's debate day and beyond.

And don't forget -- Elizabeth doesn't sell off her time to wealthy donors at private fundraisers. She doesn't accept any support from federally registered lobbyists or corporate PACs, and there's no Super PAC waiting in the wings to help her at a moment's notice.

If we're going to hit this powerfully important fundraising goal, it comes down to grassroots donations from generous people like you.

**So, if you're ready to own a piece of this movement, please chip in now and help bring this grassroots movement closer to our November goal.** **[Here's where you can chip in.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ad0/45c30650/11a01bb66/66f481b4/1896320599/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDg0Rl9ERUJfU0hPX1JfMjAxOTExMTlfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML84F_DEB_SHO_R_20191119_V1S2_P")**

Hope to see you on the road soon,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: VOTER POLL: Lt. Col. Vindman is testifying despite the attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman is testifying right now as one of the key witnesses who directly heard Trump's phone call with President Zelensky in July \-- the very call that started this inquiry. Trump and his deplorable base have wasted no time trashing Vindman's character and questioning his loyalty and patriotism. President Bone Spurs can't even hold his tongue when it comes to respecting those who have worked tirelessly to protect this country. True patriotism is defending our Constitution against all threats, foreign and domestic. That includes officials who put their own self-interests first and presidents who are too focused on money, power, and revenge to give a damn about the future of this country. Even so-called moderate Republicans in Congress, ever the profiles in courage, are going silent while their base lets loose attacks on witnesses like Lt. Col. Vindman. We need to hear NOW from engaged Democrats like you: **Do you stand with Lt. Col. Vindman?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd2/6e9863e8/1662d1db/1db0ad37/2630235422/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6rWActsL") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd2/6e9863e8/1662d1db/1db0ad37/2630235422/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6rWActsL") Thank you so much for your response \-- your feedback is critical in helping us set our strategy for taking back the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd2/6e9863e8/1662d1db/1db0ad35/2630235422/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191119a.ND-b&refcode2=wd4mPh1I6uAqo3KOc3Ij")

name: Impeachment Update (Tiffany Shedd)
subject: what do YOU think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends,

The radical Democrats in Congress will hold public hearings this week in their continued effort to impeach our President. name: Mark Warner
subject: I refuse to stop fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Not so long ago, Virginians with pre-existing conditions found themselves either paying extraordinarily high healthcare costs or lacking coverage altogether.
|
---
| | Derek,

Not so long ago, Virginians with pre-existing conditions found themselves either paying extraordinarily high healthcare costs or lacking coverage altogether.

The Affordable Care Act (ACA) required insurance companies to cover individuals with pre-existing conditions. However, the Trump administration is using taxpayer money to undermine this crucial part of the ACA, putting _millions_ of Virginians at risk.

**So I forced a Senate vote on a resolution to block their efforts to severely weaken our healthcare system and undermine protections for Virginians with pre-existing conditions.**

Unfortunately, Senate Republicans voted my resolution down. _But I refuse to stop fighting._ I've met too many families across Virginia who only have healthcare because the ACA told insurance companies they had to provide coverage.

To show my fellow Senators that there's a real cost to votes like this, I'm gathering personal stories from Virginians who have suffered at the hands of our healthcare system. **If you or someone you know has a pre-existing condition and/or struggled to gain health care coverage before the Affordable Care Act passed, will you share your story with me?** | **[Share your story](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7bb/53d9897e/53d33092/1c89e240/2871429549/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-acastories")**
---
Or, if you prefer not to share your story, will you consider making a donation instead so I can continue fighting for Virginians' healthcare in the Senate?
**[Donate](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7bb/53d9897e/53d33092/1c89e24f/2871429549/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191119__343__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
Thanks so much,
Mark

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7bb/53d9897e/53d33092/1c89e24e/2871429549/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: This is your chance!
body:
Good morning Peter!
Have you been wondering what you can do to help Marc on his campaign? This is your chance to contribute! We need your help to call voters and knock on doors to tell them about Marc.
Make calls this Wednesday! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/156239/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a2de79529b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_19_03_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a2de79529b-32267927)
Our campaign is growing, and as we are reaching out to more and more people, we need your help to get in touch with every voter we can, and tell them why Marc is the right choice for District 18! Click here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/160749/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a2de79529b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_19_03_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a2de79529b-32267927) to sign up for a block walk shift this Saturday.

https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/156239/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a2de79529b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_19_03_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a2de79529b-32267927
If you are unable to volunteer with us this week, please consider making a donation (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a2de79529b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_19_03_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a2de79529b-32267927) so we can begin funding our constituent-texting service to reach even more voters!
Donate today! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a2de79529b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_19_03_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a2de79529b-32267927)
We appreciate your continued support!

Marc

Friend: After a right-wing super PAC spent $1 million on TV ads attacking me in Michigan, recent polling is showing our Senate race TIED.
And Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. Period.
**But we have amazing news! A group of dedicated donors just made an incredibly generous offer to match every contribution, up to our $40,000 goal, so we can protect Michigan's Senate seat. **
_[**Friend - this is an incredible opportunity: Can I count on you to rush $3 now (becomes $6) to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?**](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa78/5721a3ed/71eaef9a/efa9406/3634261753/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNDQtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk144-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")_
With Mitch McConnell at the helm, Senate Republicans have already confirmed two extreme right-wing justices to the Supreme Court and threatened to dismantle affordable health care. Honestly, it's never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority.

**We can do it. Democrats can take back the Senate, but ONLY if we win here in Michigan. That's why I'm counting on you to take full advantage of this rare match opportunity - whatever you donate will go twice as far to defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat!**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How the Left is Trashing the Constitution to Fight Trump
body:
Attorney General William Barr recently delivered a lecture at the Federalist Society’s 2019 National Lawyers Convention. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6ed3c99ee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# How the Left is Trashing the Constitution to Fight Trump

_Attorney General William Barr recently delivered a lecture at the Federalist Society’s 2019 National Lawyers Convention. The_ New York Post _published excerpts of his remarks as a column last night._

“I deeply admire the American presidency as a political and constitutional institution. I believe it is one of the great and remarkable innovations in our Constitution. More than any other branch, it has fulfilled the expectations of the Framers,” Attorney General William Barr says.

“Unfortunately, over the past several decades, we have seen steady encroachment on presidential authority by the other branches of government. This process, I think, has substantially weakened the functioning of the executive branch, to the detriment of the nation.”

The left is “willing to use any means necessary to gain momentary advantage in achieving their end, regardless of collateral consequences and the systemic implications.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae58264030&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The scariest aspect of [Alexander] Vindman’s testimony is his insistence that US foreign policy should be made by unelected bureaucrats like himself. He says he and his colleagues have formulated ‘the best, most informed judgment’ about Ukraine, and it was not ‘appropriate for government officials’ like Trump’s ambassadors to act ‘counter’ to it. What arrogance,” Betsy McCaughey writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2286286698&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “At the very least, House Democrats and the media should spare us the sanctimonious narrative that every impeachment witness is a selfless hero whose credibility is above questioning and whose every statement must be taken at face value. After all, we need look no further than the appalling display of other ‘deep state’ bureaucrats connected to the Russia collusion hoax—former FBI director James Comey, his deputy Andrew McCabe, and the sneering former FBI agent Pete Strzok,” for examples of craven dishonesty and self-interest, John Daniel Davidson writes in [_**The Federalist**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=320ce29e8c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| At Google’s D.C. office last week, Ivanka Trump talked about how implementing paid family leave is a top issue for the Trump Administration. “She noted that her father is ‘the first president, Republican or Democrat, to call for a national [paid-parental–leave] plan in every single budget,” Alexandra DeSanctis writes in [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c3f77e88d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| U.S. stocks hit new records again yesterday. “The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed above 28,000 for the second straight session after hitting that level for the first time on Friday. The move from 27,000 was the 10th shortest 1,000-point gain in history, taking 90 days. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq... are also notched new highs,” [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b05eb3ffeb&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ed090c729f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9830d4d48&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4f1af56fcd)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Zach Graumann
subject: This is not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Our fundraising is down 17.09% from this time last month. Now is not the time to slow down.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3278%2E377263%2EKfgUWj) Hey Yang Gang --

Our finance director, Carly, sent me an update on fundraising this morning and it’s not great. I want to share it with you.

We’re down 17.09% compared to the same time period last month. We hit a huge milestone goal last week to keep our ads on the air, BUT in the following days, fundraising took a steep dive. And now we’re behind.

We can’t afford to slow down, not even a little bit.

[Can you pitch in $5 right now so we can catch up? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17184?t=5&akid=3278%2E377263%2EKfgUWj)

One of my favorite parts of this campaign is you, the Yang Gang, because every time we ask you to step up -- you do. And we need you to step up again.

Just this weekend, CNN left us off an Iowa Caucus poll graphic and included candidates polling lower than us -- and a candidate who isn’t even in the race yet! We can’t count on the mainstream media to get our message out or give us coverage.

[We have to go big or go home and that starts with getting our fundraising back on track. I know we can go big with your help, Yang Gang! I want to make sure you saw my video ad that was released earlier this month calling out liberals for their political games in the impeachment witch hunt.
