name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: The Government We Deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qFkOdBm5ie2yotFyc0YEFvXMbMU8dIpdDslODRSQt-8=/tCOrbFoZcSJsQ2g1QII8yuEUhvbtgjsfEF3lhMGSgMs=)

Dear Supporter,
From time to time, I'm reminded of the quote "_We get the government that we deserve_." Do we?

Do we get the government we deserve when conservative state governments close polling places, require voter ids, and racially gerrymander their districts? Is that the government we deserve?
Do we get the government we deserve when hostile nations interfere in our elections and our candidates welcome their assistance?
Do we get the government we deserve when our President seeks to involve foreign heads of state in our most sovereign democratic processes for his own personal, political gain; while our Senate Majority **(including junior Senator Thom Tillis**) remain complicit, and refuse to protect our nation and elections from these threats?

This is the United States of America, not of Ukraine or Russia or China. We need to be building walls around our elections and not around our nation. Then and only then will we begin getting the government we deserve.

Fellow North Carolinians, fellow Americans, this is the time that has found us in history to work to save this democratic experiment. WE must all participate. I am honored to be working on your behalf and I am honored by your gifts and your hard earned time and money to help get US to the United States Senate.

On this, the 156th Anniversary of the Gettysburg Address, when Lincoln proclaimed "**_that this nation, under God, shall have a new birth of freedom -- and that Government by the people, of the people, and for the people shall not perish from this earth. "_** Let US work together to ensure that it won't.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qFkOdBm5ie2yotFyc0YEFvXMbMU8dIpdDslODRSQt-8=/tCOrbFoZcSJsQ2g1QII8yuEUhvbtgjsfEF3lhMGSgMs=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qFkOdBm5ie2yotFyc0YEFvXMbMU8dIpdDslODRSQt-8=/tCOrbFoZcSJsQ2g1QII8yuEUhvbtgjsfEF3lhMGSgMs=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/qFkOdBm5ie2yotFyc0YEFvXMbMU8dIpdDslODRSQt-8=/mi12nLDo7iAjYBHPDh4TWk-cy021TNE_GfjXXf1A650=).

name: Christina Finello
subject: How we’re going to win PA-01
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Peter -- A quick update \-- we are building a grassroots campaign to be proud of and one that can beat Donald Trump’s lackey, Brian Fitzpatrick, next November. Along the way there are going to be naysayers \-- lots of them. And we will get our fair share of reporters who run stories with “anonymous sources” criticizing us. After all, Democrats have tried and failed to win this district time and again. But this time is different for the following reasons:
1. This is a district that Gov. Tom Wolf and Sen. Bob Casey carried by 20%!!!! And Hillary Clinton won by 2%.

2. Since 2016, there have been 27,000 new registrants, and 75% of them are under the age of 45. Democrats have a registration advantage among these new voters by 13%.

3. This time we can compete in Lower Bucks.

I grew up in a typical Catholic family in Lower Bucks, born in Bristol and raised in Warminster. We were devoted to each other, to our neighbors, and to the common good. Now, my husband and I are raising two kids, juggling childcare, work schedules, and finances just like every other family around here. We understand what it’s like when you are dealt surprise medical bills or forced to pay higher taxes because of the Trump tax bill (while billionaires get tax breaks). Simply put, I’m the candidate who comes from Lower Bucks. I am not afraid of the fight ahead. I am the only candidate who has won an election in a heavily Republican municipality without compromising my Democratic beliefs, and I am the only candidate who can bring those Democrats and Independents who have voted for Fitzpatrick back into the fold. If you’re ready to win PA-01, please make a contribution now: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12027636/123203933/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191119b&refcode2=9xR0XGgbBwVKZUzMjCsB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBkNmYzZi0xNzBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BKKphu94m0BgVj97IjYwz9VmVCgE29xms5fymRddjpE=) Let’s keep this campaign’s momentum going! Christina | | Paid for by Finello for Congress |
---|---|---

Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | It's no secret that I can't self-fund my campaign. I haven't raised the most money from high-dollar donors. **We will be outspent in this race. ** Jerry Brown was outspent in his race for Governor against Meg Whitman. She spent $178.5 million to his $40.5 million. **He won by 12.9%.** Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez took on an incumbent and was outspent 18-1. **She won by 13.4%.** Tom Steyer has now spent more than $55 million, accounting for 2/3rds of all ad spending by 2020 Democratic Presidential candidates. This campaign can be about a wealthy candidate buying his seat like we've seen too many times before. Or, we can finally show that the people, not money, will choose who wins. [Contribute $5, $10, or $25 today, and help us show that the support of the people - not billionaires - will keep this movement going. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+5+10+or+25+today+and+help+us+&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all") We are fighting for everyone. The poor will not be ignored. We can rebuild the middle class. Rents and health care can become affordable. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83d/3eb3e2fc/57107347/744d6baa/804232820/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83d/3eb3e2fc/57107347/744d6ba9/804232820/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83d/3eb3e2fc/57107347/744d6ba8/804232820/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | | | | | | It's no secret that I can't self-fund my campaign. I haven't raised the most money from high-dollar donors. We will be outspent in this race. Jerry Brown was outspent in his race for Governor against Meg Whitman. She spent $178.5 million to his $40.5 million. He won by 12.9%. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez took on an incumbent and was outspent 18-1. She won by 13.4%. Tom Steyer has now spent more than $55 million, accounting for 2/3rds of all ad spending by 2020 Democratic Presidential candidates. This campaign can be about a wealthy candidate buying his seat like we've seen too many times before. Or, we can finally show that the people, not money, will choose who wins. "" We are fighting for everyone. The poor will not be ignored. We can rebuild the middle class. Rents and health care can become affordable. A winning campaign doesn't require the biggest budget, but it does require massive support from voters. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

subject: AOC and Kendra Horn, Nancy Pelosi's dream team.
body:
AOC and Kendra Horn teamed up to elect Nancy Pelosi speaker. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5e776ccc7794/calling-all-patriots-12047105?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=58136e71b0&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e238dc9eda&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, Kendra Horn spent all of 2018 running as a so-called moderate in order to convince Sooners to vote for her. That, along with a last minute half-million dollar check from Mike Bloomberg put her over the edge in this conservative district.

But is she really a moderate?

Take the election for Speaker of the House for instance. Horn spent the entire election refusing to commit her vote for Nancy Pelosi, like so many so-called moderate Democrats across the country.

But what was the first thing she did when she got to Washington? She teamed up with AOC and the Squad to make far-left California liberal Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House.

That's not moderate, and Pelosi's values certainly aren't Oklahoma values.

We think we can convince Oklahomans to say NO to Kendra Horn's extremism in 2020, but we need resources in order to make sure they hear the truth about her.

That's why we need your help.

[**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us get the word out about Kendra Horn's far-left values? She's just another Pelosi rubber-stamp and we can't afford to have her in Congress another two years.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=10be99a1dd&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [STOP KENDRA HORN](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5e21ad473b&e=795c6d9796 "STOP KENDRA HORN")
---
| AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020" and the Washington Post has rated this the number two race in the country. National Journal has gone one step further and says this is the nation's number one battleground district, and Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8adc2e904d&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please contribute $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us show Oklahomans Kendra Horn's true colors as just another radical liberal Democrat.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2660cfd96d&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d804b7c0da&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12029052/123219940/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI0NzI5OC0xZjBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDlk-vi3fTrXUgDc_ixSo3c7bFJ-ZrBirodHmWyqc2k=&emci=d3b47298-1f0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=d4b47298-1f0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **I want to tell you about something important we did last week — but first let me show how we can flip this district.**

I've spent 21 years fighting for the people as a public school teacher, union organizer, and civil rights lawyer. I’ve fought for workers, marginalized folks; for people the political process has left behind. This district needs someone who will stand up for regular people, not corporate interests and high-dollar donors. We endured years of absentee leadership from McCaul — we need a change. **[I am ready to be a real representative for this district but I rely on you—not big-monied interests—to support our campaign. Will you help send me to Washington so I can fight for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12029053/123219941/203122784?refcode=em111919&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI0NzI5OC0xZjBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDlk-vi3fTrXUgDc_ixSo3c7bFJ-ZrBirodHmWyqc2k=)**

We are going to bring change to this district by continuing the work our campaign championed in 2018, creating a broad coalition that includes more and more voices. Reaching out is of course the first step in hearing from people.

**Last week, our campaign released a Chinese language version of our website and sat down with members of the Chinese-American community here in Austin to discuss immigration, education, and common-sense gun reforms.[Check it out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12029054/123219942/-425524750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI0NzI5OC0xZjBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDlk-vi3fTrXUgDc_ixSo3c7bFJ-ZrBirodHmWyqc2k=&emci=d3b47298-1f0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=d4b47298-1f0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12029055/123219943/-425524750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI0NzI5OC0xZjBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDlk-vi3fTrXUgDc_ixSo3c7bFJ-ZrBirodHmWyqc2k=&emci=d3b47298-1f0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=d4b47298-1f0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
Reaching new voters through this kind of outreach is how we win. McCaul has spent his years in Congress kowtowing to the people who write his campaign checks, all the while ignoring the needs of his actual constituents. We will flip this district by making this election not about left or right, but the top and the bottom. McCaul has fought for the top. I am fighting for the bottom. [**I need your help to continue the amazing work we have done to make the Texas 10th a national battleground. Can you chip in right now so we can fight for everyone our system has left behind?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12029056/123219944/203122784?refcode=em111919&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI0NzI5OC0xZjBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDlk-vi3fTrXUgDc_ixSo3c7bFJ-ZrBirodHmWyqc2k=)

clean_body: Peter, I want to tell you about something important we did last week — but first let me show how we can flip this district. I've spent 21 years fighting for the people as a public school teacher, union organizer, and civil rights lawyer. I’ve fought for workers, marginalized folks; for people the political process has left behind. This district needs someone who will stand up for regular people, not corporate interests and high-dollar donors. We endured years of absentee leadership from McCaul — we need a change. = We are going to bring change to this district by continuing the work our campaign championed in 2018, creating a broad coalition that includes more and more voices. Reaching out is of course the first step in hearing from people. Last week, our campaign released a Chinese language version of our website and sat down with members of the Chinese-American community here in Austin to discuss immigration, education, and common-sense gun reforms. Reaching new voters through this kind of outreach is how we win. McCaul has spent his years in Congress kowtowing to the people who write his campaign checks, all the while ignoring the needs of his actual constituents. We will flip this district by making this election not about left or right, but the top and the bottom. McCaul has fought for the top. I am fighting for the bottom. = = = = = = We can flip this district with your help! Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

Adam Schiff continues to pursue impeachment at all costs. Schiff continues abusing his position of power on all things impeachment. And he's made his verdict before the proceedings even began! This is **NOT OK**.
[_**Join the hundreds of Ohioans that have signed on with Team Turner to tell Schiff NO MORE!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Make sure your name is on our petition before we send Schiff the longest list of American patriots who oppose his gross abuse of power.
[_**Add your name to Team Turner 's Petition! Click here>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robert, Team Turner

Sent from Robert's iPhone
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mike Turner
Date: Tues, Nov 18, 2019 at 4:38 PM
Subject: Schiff's secret dealings
Peter,
Before impeachment was made public, Adam Schiff scheduled **TEN** closed door witness impeachment interviews. Now, Adam Schiff is holding public hearings where his witnesses have never even met or discussed Ukraine with President Trump!
We cannot allow Schiff to continue his politically charged impeachment investigation! [_**Sign my team 's petition TODAY to hold Schiff accountable! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Secrecy has no place in Congress. I believe in upholding the Constitution and with that, transparency in government. Adam Schiff has demonstrated his disregard for both of these.
We can't allow Schiff to continue this unfair and politically motivated investigation into the President. [_**Adam Schiff needs to be held accountable!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Will you sign my petition?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Join me in holding Adam Schiff accountable today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
House leadership has lost sight of what is important: [**_improving the lives of Americans!_**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Instead of continuing this broken, partisan process, Washington **SHOULD** be focusing on important issues like improving our healthcare, ending the opioid epidemic, and so many others.
However, Schiff and Nancy Pelosi have refused to address these critical issues and instead are continuing on their divisive, partisan impeachment investigation.
For months now, I have joined my colleagues in calling for Schiff to step aside. It is clear that something larger scale is necessary to get the message across loud and clear.
[_**J**_ _**_**oin**_ thousands of patriots and sign onto our petition today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) It's time Schiff is held accountable for his actions.
[_**Do you agree that Adam Schiff should drop his politically motivated investigation?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDExNDY5MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc0Mjc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Let us know!
Together, we can send him our loud and clear message.
Thank you,

Mike Turner

name: Christina Finello
subject: My strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, My strategy to win PA-01 is the same as the strategies Democrats ran this year to FLIP Bucks County and re-elect Democrats in Montgomery County: getting out there, knocking on a neighbor’s door, and earning another vote one conversation at a time. We’ll need to bring on more staff to organize our grassroots efforts, but I’m the kind of candidate who will work her tail off to win this seat so I can better serve working families across our district. Here’s a selfie from after I finished some GOTV canvass shifts in Northampton. It was a bit chilly that evening, but you can’t stop me from hustling to turn out the vote! Now that the 2019 local elections are all wrapped up, my focus is on 2020 and what we need to do between now and our election. You see, I’m the kind of person who likes to be efficient about getting things done \-- so my team and I already have our strategy mapped out. At a PACKED Get Out the Vote canvass launch in Levittown, I took some time to speak with Attorney General Josh Shapiro and U.S. Senator Bob Casey about our race (both won PA-01 in their 2016 and 2018 elections respectively). These two great Democrats are proof that we can flip this seat in 2020, especially if we keep this momentum rolling! Someone on my team snapped this picture of me chatting with Attorney General Josh Shapiro about what it takes to win competitive seats like PA-01 so we can deliver real solutions facing our district. name: Kevin Lata, Margaret Good for Congress
subject: with a fight like ours
body:
With a fight like ours, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. Hey there -- our team’s got a busy evening ahead of us so I have to make this short.
I just checked in with our finance director and she told me we’re $2,064 behind on our mid-month fundraising goal. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.19]
Hitting these goals is critical to our campaign – the goals tell us what we have to accomplish every single day in order to sustain our grassroots movement.
If we can’t hit them, we’re forced to shift our entire operation accordingly. That puts our staff, field program, and voter outreach plans at risk.
Team – with a fight like ours, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. We must hit the goals we set for ourselves if we want to flip this seat from red to blue.
So if you can help us close the gap before the end of November, please donate here: secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.19]
Thanks so much,
Kevin Lata
Campaign Manager
Margaret Good for Congress

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: ⚠️The risk is too great | Stand against offshore drilling >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello: Ed Markey is fighting back against President Trump's plan to expand offshore drilling.

The risk is too great. An oil spill would devastate our economy and would be detrimental to our environment.

_**[Stand with Ed Markey against President Trump and Big Oil. Click here to sign the petition and say NO to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7a/693b8b0a/43ca94f4/72de78c7/3889657672/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7a/693b8b0a/43ca94f4/72de78c7/3889657672/VEsE/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *

Hello,

President Donald Trump is desperate to open up our coastal waters to Big Oil for drilling.

An oil spill would cripple our economy and devastate our environment. I will never support irresponsible corporate fossil fuel interests over the needs of the businesses, communities, and ecosystems that make up our beautiful coastlines.

_**_**[Stand with me against President Trump and Big Oil. Click here to sign the petition and say no to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7a/693b8b0a/43ca94f4/72de78c7/3889657672/VEsF/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7a/693b8b0a/43ca94f4/72de78c7/3889657672/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
We need to stand up and say NO to offshore drilling and start saying YES to offshore wind farms, solar power, and electric vehicles as the way for the future.

But the Trump administration recently blocked the permitting an 800-megawatt offshore wind farm, leaving tens of thousands of jobs hanging in the balance.

I'm not giving up. The Green New Deal revolution is changing everything, and we're just getting started.

Republicans have a chance to change and work with us to put these policies in place, but if they don't, they are going to be changed at the ballot box.

_**_**[Sign the petition and stand against President Trump and Big Oil. Say NO to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7a/693b8b0a/43ca94f4/72de78c7/3889657672/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7a/693b8b0a/43ca94f4/72de78c7/3889657672/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
Thanks,

Ed

Peter,

**Voted YES on Obamacare. Currently supports Medicare For All. A ZERO percent rating from respected pro-life group National Right to Life. A “D” rating from the National Rifle Association.**

_These are left-wing Senator Jeanne Shaheen’s “Greatest Hits.”_

But that’s not all. During Shaheen’s time as New Hampshire Governor, she took a no-new-taxes pledge. But that didn’t last long. In 2001, Shaheen attempted to implement a sales tax in New Hampshire – which had never been done in state history. Thankfully, she FAILED – the state legislature rejected her proposal.

_If these are Jeanne Shaheen’s Greatest Hits, it’s time to turn off her left-wing music for good, and march to a different beat._

clean_body: Voted YES on Obamacare. Currently supports Medicare For All. A ZERO percent rating from respected pro-life group National Right to Life. A “D” rating Stand With COREY Jeanne Shaheen has produced a lot of left-wing “hits” in her time as a career politician. In 2016, she endorsed Hillary Clinton for President. See more of Shaheen’s worst liberal positions below... | | Peter, Voted YES on Obamacare. Currently supports Medicare For All. A ZERO percent rating from respected pro-life group National Right to Life. A “D” rating from the National Rifle Association. These are left-wing Senator Jeanne Shaheen’s “Greatest Hits.” But that’s not all. During Shaheen’s time as New Hampshire Governor, she took a no-new-taxes pledge. But that didn’t last long. In 2001, Shaheen attempted to implement a sales tax in New Hampshire – which had never been done in state history. Thankfully, she FAILED – the state legislature rejected her proposal. To top it all off, Shaheen endorsed Hillary Clinton for president in 2016. If these are Jeanne Shaheen’s Greatest Hits, it’s time to turn off her left-wing music for good, and march to a different beat. It’s time to Stand With COREY! Corey Lewandowski is standing up for President Trump’s agenda and fighting back against the lies being spread in the Fake News Media. subject: We have to stand up for our seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | Our society is judged by the respect we show for the most vulnerable among us. And Republican Steve Chabot has let our seniors down. We need representatives who will fight tooth and nail to protect Social Security and Medicare -- we pay into them our entire lives, and we rely on them to be there when we retire. Without these programs, many seniors would fall into poverty and couldn't afford their vital medications. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Our society is judged by the respect we show for the most vulnerable among us. **And Republican Steve Chabot has let our seniors down:** [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191119_SSMed_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191119_SSMed_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191119_SSMed_U1_X1") **We need representatives who will fight tooth and nail to protect Social Security and Medicare** \-- we pay into them our entire lives, and we rely on them to be there when we retire. **Our seniors deserve to retire with dignity and security.**
Steve Chabot has a taxpayer funded pension from his decades in Congress, so he may not need to rely on Medicare or Social Security.
_But millions of seniors do._
[**Let 's show Chabot that if he attacks our seniors, we'll come for his seat -- chip in today to send him home ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191119_SSMed_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Letrsquos+show+Chabot+that+if+he+attacks&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191119_SSMed_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191119_SSMed_U1_X1")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, Devin Nunes, the ranking GOP member on the House Intelligence Committee, is on a war path to uncover the identity of the whistleblower who first broke the Ukraine scandal. Today, he tried to force it out of Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman during his questioning before the committee, disregarding the fact that whistleblowers are protected under federal law. (Though we know the GOP doesn't really care about federal law if it gets in their way of pushing a false partisan agenda.) Rep. Adam Schiff halted this outrageous line of questioning before the identity could be revealed, but it still is shocking to say the least. But before she takes... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528a07/45c30650/11bfef434/66f4b063/4053784278/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Tomorrow night, Elizabeth will be at the debate making the case for big, structural change to a national audience.

**But before she takes the stage, we want to hear from you.**

**[This movement isn't just about Elizabeth or the White House. It's about all of us coming together to fight for what's right. So take our survey today to let us know what issues are important to you before tomorrow night's debate.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528a07/45c30650/11bfef434/66f4b062/4053784278/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw4OVBfU1VSX0lTU19XXzIwMTkxMTE5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EML89P_SUR_ISS_W_20191119_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We're proud of what we've achieved together -- releasing plans to rebuild our government and economy to serve working people, empowering Americans to fight for change in their own communities, and growing our grassroots movement nationwide.

Elizabeth will be fighting for you on the debate stage, so it's important that your voice stays front and center -- and so we want to know the issues that brought you into this fight, and why you want big, structural change.

**[Take our two-minute survey and let us know what issues are most important to you before tomorrow's debate.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528a07/45c30650/11bfef434/66f4b062/4053784278/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw4OVBfU1VSX0lTU19XXzIwMTkxMTE5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EML89P_SUR_ISS_W_20191119_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

name: Hoosier Dems
subject: why Holcomb skipped out on teachers today (hint: 💰💰)

body:

| | Tens of thousands of Hoosiers packed the Statehouse today. They came from around the state to give voice to teachers and students. **One person was noticeably absent. Governor Eric Holcomb. ** He jetted off to Florida to meet with his campaign’s biggest donor. You can’t make this stuff up. **He chose to blow off teachers for potential campaign cash.** **[Can you chip in $25 to show Gov. Holcomb we’ve got teachers’ backs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12032093/123259644/1463923403?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTEzYjRmYy0zNDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv7WIrc2uf36HuFZRUzpDaTDWzrKCkmhnMOi1S4xP64=)** It’s a preview for 2020. Holcomb will rely on big money donors to drown out the voices of working Hoosiers. It’s why we’ve got to start organizing now. And that’s exactly what we intend to do. name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: 10 weeks is 10 lifetimes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I grew up with a grandmother who had come from Mexico when she was seven years old. She was an orphan. She lost her parents and she worked as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter for her whole life. She raised my mom as a single parent, and my mom raised me and my brother as a single parent. I think in our community people have had to deal with a lot more challenges than running for president; **and we've been determined,
and we've been persistent,
and we've stuck it through,
and we've kept going,
and we haven't quit,
and we've kept pushing and trying to change things.** [And that's what I'm going to do. **I won 't quit.** We're going through, working to get to Iowa and building strength.](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+And+thats+what+Im+going+to+do+I+wonrsquo&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all") There are 10 weeks left until the Iowa caucus, and these days, ten weeks is ten lifetimes in politics. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83e/3eb3e2fc/5716d517/744d6aa3/3701429717/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83e/3eb3e2fc/5716d517/744d6aa2/3701429717/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc83e/3eb3e2fc/5716d517/744d6aa1/3701429717/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191119_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | | | | | | I grew up with a grandmother who had come from Mexico when she was seven years old. She was an orphan. She lost her parents and she worked as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter for her whole life. She raised my mom as a single parent, and my mom raised me and my brother as a single parent. I think in our community people have had to deal with a lot more challenges than running for president; and we've been determined, and we've been persistent, and we've stuck it through, and we've kept going, and we haven't quit, and we've kept pushing and trying to change things. At our latest team meeting, we came up with a list of new items we need to add to our budget. | ******Mondaire Jones Campaign Checklist We don’t accept even a dime from corporate PACs or special interests, so when we say we’re counting on grassroots donors like you, friend, we mean it. The donations we receive from emails like these is how we can afford to run this campaign. This campaign is being built with $5, $20, $50 donations from working-class people who dream of the future that Mondaire is fighting for.**** ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Hillary Holley
subject: REMINDER: Join Fair Fight Action's Purge Notice Phone and Text Banks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Join us in Atlanta, volunteer remotely, or host your own event! |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa55e/34a064cc/1b05844b/7036cc8/1057504194/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend, Fair Fight Action recently learned that Georgia's Secretary of State is set to purge over 300,000 registered voters from the voting rolls, so we are deploying resources to ensure voters have the information they need to remain registered and able to vote. On November 21, just one day after the Presidential Debate in Atlanta, Fair Fight Action is holding a phone and text bank at Ebenezer Baptist Church to notify voters and help them stay on the rolls. We are also holding virtual phone and text banks so all of our volunteers--no matter where you are--can help! The location of the Atlanta phone bank is: Ebenezer Baptist Church
101 Jackson Street
Atlanta, GA 30312
**[Sign up here!](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa55e/34a064cc/1b05844b/7036cc9/1057504194/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScMgi5_BVggKVLunG0MwT0kEDAUh44KABtC9shyDT3-FDpEJw/viewform")** You can also host your own phone or text bank from wherever you are! [**Sign up here to volunteer remotely or to host your own event.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa55e/34a064cc/1b05844b/7036cc9/1057504194/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScMgi5_BVggKVLunG0MwT0kEDAUh44KABtC9shyDT3-FDpEJw/viewform") The phone and text bank will be from 10:00am - 9:00pm. Volunteers are welcome to commit to as little or as much time as they can. On the signup form, you can select which time slots are best for you. **Let 's be clear: voters should not lose their right to vote simply because they have decided not to express that right in recent elections.** We encourage anyone who receives a postcard to return it right away, and we encourage all voters to periodically check their registration status at [mvp.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa55e/34a064cc/1b05844b/7036cd6/1057504194/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do"). Any Georgian with questions about voting should call the Democratic Party of Georgia's Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816. With your help, we can continue to combat voter suppression across Georgia. In Solidarity, Hillary Holley Organizing Director, Fair Fight Action P.S: Looking for events and watch parties for the Presidential Debate on Wednesday? [Click here!](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa55e/34a064cc/1b05844b/7036cd7/1057504194/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/status/1196575433963298818?s=21") |
---|---|---

|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Strengthening Indiana's Education
body:
Education was in focus today at the Statehouse, and strengthening the state’s education and workforce development efforts have been a priority for... |
---
| |
---
| Dear Hoosier Republican -

Education was in focus today at the Statehouse, and strengthening the state’s education and workforce development efforts have been a priority for Governor Holcomb and Republican legislators from day one. Parents, teachers and students have allies and partners in the governor’s office and Indiana General Assembly.

Governor Holcomb identified the need to increase teacher compensation as vital to ensuring Hoosier kids receive a world-class education. During his 2019 State of the State Address, the governor said, “a great education depends on great teachers...and one way to attract and retain more of those teachers is to make teacher pay more competitive.”

And he’s already taken concrete action to ensure resources are available to local school corporations so they can increase the compensation of their teachers. Earlier this year, the governor instructed the state to pay off $150 million in local school pension liabilities. This freed up $150 million in local school budgets across Indiana, which can now be used to give teachers a well-deserved raise.

Governor Holcomb also created the Indiana Teacher Pay Commission to find sustainable revenue streams that will ensure teacher pay increases are long-term raises and not one-time bonuses.
**The concerns of Indiana’s education community have been heard and are being acted on. Just look at a few highlights of what’s happened so far:**
* _Over 50% of the state’s annual budget is devoted to education._
* _Governor Holcomb and the General Assembly INCREASED education funding $763 million this budget cycle._
* _Governor Holcomb and the General Assembly have INCREASED education investment by $1.6 billion cumulatively since 2017._
* _Governor Holcomb and the General Assembly expanded Pre-K programs for low-income kids._
* _3,500 kids in over 75 counties are served by this expansion_
* _Computer science classes will be offered in all K-12 schools by 2021._
* _Provided opportunities for professional development for computer science teachers_
* _$19 million invested to strengthen school safety_
* _$2 million invested to support counseling and career guidance for students_
* _Expanded 21st Century Scholars program_
* _Created Office of Work-Based Learning and Apprenticeships to give students hands-on career experience while they finish their education_
* _Gov. Holcomb created Graduation Pathways so local schools and businesses could collaborate on new graduation programs._
* _Created first-ever STEM council to help bring more STEM education to school_
* _$2 million invested to enhance school technology and connectivity_

Additionally, beginning in 2021, the state’s chief education official will be part of the governor’s cabinet, and those two offices will work hand-in-glove to ensure Hoosier parents, teachers and students have the best education options possible.

Indiana has come a long way under Republican leadership and there’s more work still to be done. We’re grateful to the teachers who’ve made their voices heard and are doing so much to prepare future generations of Hoosiers.

Thank you,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
| |
---

---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Don't trash strong emissions standards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump and his corporate cronies have taken these past three years to dismantle as many environmental regulations as possible in an effort to help big corporations pollute more and put profits over people. One of his latest rollbacks is removing California's right to set its own vehicle emissions standards \-- rules put in place to limit harmful emissions that California has been leading the country on. These emissions are harmful for so many reasons, namely that they contribute to climate change, worsen air pollution, and cause serious health conditions for children and elderly people. Trump wants to put more of these in the air, simply for the sake of saving a buck and helping out his millionaire friends. [**We won 't stand for this. If you believe that the White House needs to stop harming the environment, destroying a future for our children, and start caring about the American people, please add your name to our petition. We need as many Americans as possible to raise up their voices and push back against this sham of a government.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd6/6e9863e8/16999eb8/1db0adb9/3469823640/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/wdtop/") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd6/6e9863e8/16999eb8/1db0adb9/3469823640/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/wdtop/")

subject: As the old saying goes, you are the company you keep! Well, THIS is who Susan Collins surrounds herself with:
body:
Open for photos.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f39/4bef7a87/6bc312f6/287ff3e3/1967986727/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
As the old saying goes, you are the company you keep! Well, THIS is who Susan Collins surrounds herself with:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f39/4bef7a87/6bc312f6/287ff3e2/1967986727/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191119-2-full")
Here she is with Mitch McConnell.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f39/4bef7a87/6bc312f6/287ff3e2/1967986727/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191119-2-full")
And Donald Trump.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f39/4bef7a87/6bc312f6/287ff3e2/1967986727/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191119-2-full")
And Maine's former governor Paul LePage, who called himself "Donald Trump before Donald Trump."
Susan Collins wants to label herself an "independent voice," but we know better. She's just a reliable vote for her party in the Senate - and it's time to replace her with someone who will stand up for what's right:
[**Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate. Together, we will defeat Susan Collins and elect a leader who puts Maine first.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f39/4bef7a87/6bc312f6/287ff3e2/1967986727/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191119-2-full")
Thanks for being a part of the grassroots team that's going to help flip this Senate seat.
\- Team Sara

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Eliz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I’ve been on the ground with Eliz, knocking on doors in her district. I’ve seen the positive response this former educator gets from Democrats, Independents and even Republicans when she talks about improving public education, confronting climate change and investing in healthcare.
Hi,
I’m writing about an important race here in Texas.
With our help, Eliz Markowitz can win a special runoff election and increase our chances of producing a Democratic majority in the Texas state house.
This has huge implications for 2020.
This election will be an initial test of our ability to win other races across the state, including for Congress and U.S. Senate. And — it will give us an indication of our ability to deliver Texas’ 38 electoral votes to the Democratic nominee for president.
Though Donald Trump won House District 28 by ten points in 2016, Eliz came in first place in the election earlier this month against a number of well-funded Republicans.
But she is now in a runoff against a Republican who’s loaned his campaign hundreds of thousands of dollars.**Eliz is at serious risk of being outspent. And we are at risk at losing this great opportunity for Texas and the country.**
[**Can you make a $3 donation right now to Eliz’s campaign? Flipping House District 28 from red to blue could not be more important.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42002?refcode=ema20191119-68237&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=68237%2E444211%2EOFhbUZ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42002?refcode=ema20191119-68237&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=68237%2E444211%2EOFhbUZ)**
I’ve been on the ground with Eliz, knocking on doors in her district. I’ve seen the positive response this former educator gets from Democrats, Independents and even Republicans when she talks about improving public education, confronting climate change and investing in healthcare.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42002?refcode=ema20191119-68237&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=68237%2E444211%2EOFhbUZ)
You and I have seen firsthand what’s possible when Texans come together to build a true grassroots campaign. We know that if enough of us step up to the plate and support her, Eliz can win District 28 and help us take back Texas and the country.
[**Thank you for making a donation today.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42002?refcode=ema20191119-68237&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=68237%2E444211%2EOFhbUZ) It means a lot.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=68237%2E444211%2EOFhbUZ). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

We know that if enough of us step up to the plate and support her, Eliz can win District 28 and help us take back Texas and the country. It means a lot. Beto Paid for by Beto for America

body:
I wanted to make sure you saw my campaign's latest ad on a topic that is close to my heart and the hearts of countless Mainers: the outrageous cost of prescription drugs.

_****_
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw my campaign's latest ad on a topic that is close to my heart and the hearts of countless Mainers: **the outrageous cost of prescription drugs.**
[**You can view the ad by clicking this link or the image below:**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDExNTAwNTMS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc2MzU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

If you can believe it, Peter, it used to be the case that pharmacists often were not allowed to discuss cheaper options with patients. Now, thanks to a bipartisan bill I wrote, when you go to pick up your prescriptions, your pharmacist can tell you if there is a less expensive way to pay. While I am immensely proud of this success, there is still major work that needs to be done.
Peter, it's critical to my campaign's success that every Mainer views this ad, and I need your help to make sure that happens.
[**I hope you will forward this email to your friends and family in Maine, and then consider making a donation of $5 or more to help me keep it on the air.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDExNTAwNTMS1&r=OTY0OTA2MTEyMDk4S0&b=0&j=MTY0MTc2MzU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I can promise you this: I will never stop fighting for what's right. I will never stop fighting for you.
Thank you for all the support,

Susan Collins

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Demand climate leadership from Wednesday's debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
There has to be AT LEAST one question.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&utm_campaign=debate-1&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7989%2E868730%2EoAQRBl) Friend, "No, you are not closing with an Ellen question." "This question about Ellen is so stupid." "Tonight's proceedings are sounding like a convincing argument that there really should be a dedicated climate-change debate." Those were some of the reactions after last month's DNC debate concluded --_without a single question about climate change,_ but a dedicated question instead on Ellen DeGeneres. Don't get me wrong, I think Ellen is great. But the failure of the DNC and the media to give the climate crisis the time and attention it demands should make everyone reading this email furious. These debates shouldn't be about entertainment for entertainment's sake -- they should be a serious conversation about our future. **There's another DNC Democratic Debate happening tomorrow, and we need to know that climate will be a focus for the candidates _and_ the moderators.** [**Add your name next to mine to call on the DNC and all the 2020 candidates to make climate change a priority in Wednesday's debate.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&utm_campaign=debate-1&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7989%2E868730%2EoAQRBl) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&utm_campaign=debate-1&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7989%2E868730%2EoAQRBl)
---
Look, we already know there's too much at stake here to step back, but there's even more on the line right now than usual:
Last week, President Trump's nominee to lead FEMA said, and I quote: "The climate has changed. I cannot attribute the scientific reasons why."
With wildfires raging in California and the East Coast still recovering from multiple historic hurricanes this year, we know that the climate is changing -- and we know exactly why. FEMA's job is to respond to these disasters -- how can they do that if it's led by someone who denies the science of our climate crisis?
To me, that is certainly a more pressing issue than Ellen DeGeneres. I hope, maybe, this time the DNC agrees.
[**Add your name next to mine to demand that climate is a focus on Wednesday's debate stage -- because we deserve more from candidates, moderators, AND from our party leadership.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&source=ema_2019-11-19_debate-1&utm_campaign=debate-1&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7989%2E868730%2EoAQRBl)
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: There has to be AT LEAST one question. | Friend, "No, you are not closing with an Ellen question." "This question about Ellen is so stupid." "Tonight's proceedings are sounding like a convincing argument that there really should be a dedicated climate-change debate." Those were some of the reactions after last month's DNC debate concluded --without a single question about climate change, but a dedicated question instead on Ellen DeGeneres. Don't get me wrong, I think Ellen is great. But the failure of the DNC and the media to give the climate crisis the time and attention it demands should make everyone reading this email furious. These debates shouldn't be about entertainment for entertainment's sake -- they should be a serious conversation about our future. There's another DNC Democratic Debate happening tomorrow, and we need to know that climate will be a focus for the candidates and the moderators. | Look, we already know there's too much at stake here to step back, but there's even more on the line right now than usual: Last week, President Trump's nominee to lead FEMA said, and I quote: "The climate has changed. I cannot attribute the scientific reasons why." With wildfires raging in California and the East Coast still recovering from multiple historic hurricanes this year, we know that the climate is changing -- and we know exactly why. FEMA's job is to respond to these disasters -- how can they do that if it's led by someone who denies the science of our climate crisis? To me, that is certainly a more pressing issue than Ellen DeGeneres. I hope, maybe, this time the DNC agrees. Very truly yours, Jay
